content.en:
Ye Tian came out of the Wind Ancient River and immediately chose to enter the Source God Pavilion, although his injuries were very serious, but he would not fall, now he wanted to exchange resources as soon as possible, otherwise the resources suitable for breaking through the realm of the Wind Ancient Source Ancestor were exchanged, and he could only exchange other resources.

So, he began to submit a mission, taking out the corpse of an Eternal Tribulation and using it to submit the mission.

The Origin God Pavilion naturally had a way to determine the time of death of these Eternal Tribulations, and it could be deduced whether they had fallen in the Fenggu River, and this task could not be faked.

Soon, the appraisal was completed, and Ye Tian completed any.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to exchange some scarce resources.

For example, the Mizusawa cold leaf and the three-flower fruit on the other side, which are very suitable for the double supreme to break through the realm of the triple supreme, are both of relatively valuable things, even better than the eternal ancient pine leaves, but these two treasures are only possessed by some special treasure lands, and they are also relatively rare.

Ye Tian immediately exchanged these two treasures, and finally exchanged for a rare treasure that can help the Triple Supreme Attack the Quadruple Supreme - Immortal Source Heart Liquid, this treasure is taken from the heart and blood essence of the Immortal Source Bird, and finally condensed into a drop of Immortal Source Heart Liquid, its value is very high, because the Immortal Source Bird is very powerful, it is a special source sea life, and you can become a supreme one when you become an adult, and the best of them can become a sevenfold supreme one.

To obtain a drop of Immortal Source Heart Fluid, you have to kill an Immortal Source Bird, which is why the value is so high.

The Immortal Heart Liquid can help the Triple Supreme break through to the Quadruple Supreme without any sequelae, but once it is used, it will have no effect in the future.

It can be said that this resource can only be used once.

After exchanging these resources, Ye Tian's contribution points obtained by completing the task were almost exhausted, so he left the Source God Pavilion and quickly returned to the Void Source Palace.

......

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian let the copied body automatically disintegrate, because the consumption of re-replicating the body is not large, and the cost of recovering the injury of the replicating body is even greater, and it takes a long time.

Rather than that, it's better to just let the replicating body collapse.

The copy body collapsed, Ye Tian recovered the Eternal Realm finger, and immediately began to sort out the harvest.

This time, after killing those Eternal Tribulation Clans, not to mention the other resources obtained, the Wind Source Golden Crystal is the big harvest.

Wow!

A large amount of Wind Source Golden Crystals were placed on the ground of the Void Source Hall, piled up into a huge mountain.

"This time I was lucky, I got so many Wind Source Golden Crystals!" Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

If others knew that he had obtained so many Wind Source Golden Crystals, they would be jealous to death.

--------------------

The Eternal Tribulation, the only supreme Eternal Tribulation.

A Ninefold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clan in charge of the Battle of the Wind Ancient River was extremely angry when he heard that a Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clan, which was comparable to the Void Divine Son, had been killed and a large number of Wind Source Golden Crystals had been snatched.

It's a pity that he can't enter, otherwise he will inevitably intercept and kill Ye Tian.

Subsequently, he passed the news to a half-step Eternal Realm existence of the Eternal Tribulation Clan, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor!

The Heavenly Ruin Tribulation Ancestor was also an incomparably powerful existence in the half-step Eternal Realm, ranking among the top three in the strength of the Eternal Tribulation Clan, and it was he who advocated the annexation of the Fenggu River and carried out this plan.

When he learned that Ye Tian had shown a strength comparable to the Eight Heavens' first blow, he immediately frowned.

"That Supreme One himself is not in a high realm, it should have burst out of the Eightfold Supreme Realm with the help of external forces, and he definitely paid a heavy price, but it is likely to be just a clone, if it is the body, the other party will not pay such a big price!"

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor thought to himself.

The loss of some Wind Source Gold Crystals is nothing, and the Wind Ancient River is not limited to this Wind Source Gold Crystal.

Besides, the true purpose of the Eternal Tribulation Clan was not to seize these Wind Source Golden Crystals.

Some Wind Source Golden Crystals were not enough for him to risk offending the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor, he had a greater purpose, and even the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor did not necessarily know this secret.

"If that Supreme One can continue to attack, it is easy to threaten my plan, I must send a few Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clans with powerful hole cards, at least let them have a way to resist the blow of the Eightfold Supreme One, judging from the situation at that time, the other party only has the power of one blow, as long as it resists this blow, the other party will not have any power to resist. "

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor decided.

Soon, he found two Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clans.

Not long after, the two Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clans came to the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor and said respectfully, "I've seen the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor!"

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor directly ordered: "I let you go to the Fenggu River, and I have an important task entrusted to you. "

"Yes!"

The two Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Ancestors immediately responded.

Rushing!!

Two treasures fell into their hands.

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor introduced: "These two treasures are the Immortal Armor and the Void Water, the Immortal Armor defends everything, even a blow from the Eightfold Supreme is difficult to kill you, but once you use it, it will consume your potential." And the Void Water can turn itself into a state of nothingness, even if it is an attack by the Supreme of the Eightfold Realm, it can weaken more than ninety out of nine, but it will also initially affect the eternal body, so if it is not in a desperate situation, these two treasures cannot be used, but once it is in a desperate situation, it must be used!"

"Yes, Heavenly Ruins Ancestor Robbery!"

The two Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Ancestors nodded in response.

Subsequently, the Heavenly Ruin Tribulation Ancestor summoned the two Eternal Tribulation Clans for this mission, telling them to keep it secret, even if they fell, they couldn't tell it.

Then, the two Eternal Tribulations rushed to the Wind Ancient River.

The other side.

Ye Tian began to refine the special substance of the Wind Source Gold Liquid in the Wind Source Gold Crystal, basically a large piece of Wind Source Gold Liquid could only refine a small drop of Wind Source Gold Liquid.

It seems that there are a lot of wind source gold crystals, but if you refine them all in the end, you can probably refine 100 ml of wind source gold liquid.

Year after year, the refining process went smoothly.

One day, Ye Tian finally refined all the Wind Source Gold Crystals into Wind Source Gold Liquid.

Subsequently, he began to absorb the Wind Source Gold Liquid to enhance his Endless Eternal Body.

The first drop of wind source gold liquid turned into a majestic energy that swept through the body.

Rumble!!!!

The Endless Eternals seemed to have turned into a gluttonous giant mouth, devouring this drop of wind source gold.

The Endless Eternal Body, which was originally at the peak of entry, actually broke the shackles of the Endless Eternal Body with the help of this drop of Wind Source Gold Liquid.

Click!!!

The shackles of the bottleneck were broken, and Ye Tian's endless eternal body stepped into the realm of Xiaocheng in this way.
